positive: A whimsical and stylish illustration of a group of woodland creatures—a fox, a raccoon, a squirrel, and a baby deer—interact naturally in a vibrant autumn forest clearing. The style should be a sophisticated blend of linocut woodblock printing and clean, modern digital illustration, featuring thick, bold outlines and flat, unsaturated color fills inspired by vintage natural history prints. The composition should be centrally arranged with strong negative space around the subjects, emphasizing clean silhouettes and charming poses. Lighting should be diffuse and even, mimicking daylight, with a color palette dominated by burnt orange, sage green, deep mustard yellow, and rich earthy browns. Suitable for repeat surface pattern or single central apparel graphic. Minimalist, high-contrast, vector art style, perfect for screen printing.
